title: Smoky Fluffy Saudi White Yam Grill
description: A savory, fluffy grilled white yam dish infused with smoky spices and a hint of citrus, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat a charcoal or gas grill to medium-high heat (~190-200°C).
In a small bowl, mix smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Brush each yam slice lightly with olive oil, then sprinkle the spice mix evenly on both sides.
Place the seasoned yam slices on the grill, close the lid, and cook for 7-8 minutes per side, until the edges are crisp and the interior is fluffy.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the grilled yams just before removing them from the grill.
Transfer the yams to a serving platter and sprinkle chopped cilantro on top for a fresh finish.
